narrative:
Sandusky Twp township has 731 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.6 percentage points.
